name: Customers Over Credit Limit
query:
SELECT
    c.name as "Customer:Link/Udhaar Customer:180",
    c.customer_name as "Customer Name::200",
    c.phone as "Phone::140",
    c.current_balance as "Balance:Currency:120",
    c.credit_limit as "Credit Limit:Currency:120",
    (c.current_balance - c.credit_limit) as "Excess:Currency:120",
    c.last_payment_date as "Last Payment:Date:110",
    c.preferred_language as "Language::100"
FROM
    `tabUdhaar Customer` c
WHERE
    c.credit_limit > 0
    AND c.current_balance > c.credit_limit
ORDER BY
    (c.current_balance - c.credit_limit) DESC
